sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22385" key="glukupo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλῠκυ-πότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ὁ </foreign>(<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">γλυκο</itype>-codd.), <sense id="n22385.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drinker of sweetwine</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philagr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:19:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.19.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
